title: AgriCraft Seed Fix
body:
# This mod allows the conversion of AgriCraft wheat seeds into Vanilla wheat seeds. This is so that other mod's crafting recipes, which require the vanilla forms of the wheat seeds, can still be used when AgriCraft is installed. ## Why? 1.16, 1.18, and 1.20.1 versions of AgriCraft break crafting for other mods which require vanilla wheat seeds. This mod provides a simple and fair fix to that

How it works:
![Shows modded AgriCraft seed being turned into Vanilla seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/doYdkjo5/images/5b4316f91f4b480defe78b8b1ff8bf1a004878dd.png)
